executives.name: Jeffrey Quartermaine
executives.background: Mr. Quartermaine has more than 30 years of experience in senior financial and strategic management roles with ASX and TSX-listed resources companies. He has been central to the development of Perseus Mining into a multi-mine gold producer.

tenure_dates.title: Managing Director and Chief Executive Officer

executives.name: Lee-Anne de Bruin
executives.background: Ms. de Bruin has over 25 years of experience in the global resources sector, including senior executive roles at Resolute Mining, Newmont, and BHP. She is a Chartered Accountant.

executives.name: Chris Woodall
executives.background: Mr. Woodall has over 30 years of experience in the mining industry, including senior operational roles at Goldcorp and Barrick Gold.

board_of_directors.name: Jeff Quartermaine
board_of_directors.background: Managing Director and CEO of Perseus Mining Limited. Extensive experience in financial and strategic management.

board_of_directors.name: Amber Banfield
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Banfield has over 20 years of experience in the resources and energy sectors, including management roles at Worley.

board_of_directors.name: Elissa Brown
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Brown is a Chartered Accountant with over 20 years of experience in the mining and energy sectors.

board_of_directors.name: Dan Lougher
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Lougher is a highly experienced mining executive with over 40 years of experience in the industry, including as CEO of Western Areas Limited.

board_of_directors.name: John McGloin
board_of_directors.background: Mr. McGloin is a geologist and graduate of the Camborne School of Mines with over 30 years of experience in the mining industry.

board_of_directors.name: David Ransom
board_of_directors.background: Dr. Ransom has over 45 years of experience in the mining industry as a geologist and consultant.
